allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; rs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Admin ve {len\(rs\)} respuestas'\); [print\(f'  id={r[\\"id\\"]} user={r[\\"user_id\\"]} q={r[\\"question_id\\"]} eval={r[\\"evaluation\\"]}'\) for r in rs]")
